[Summary]

It's 50's! You are well-known TV host and fate sees fit to paired you up with no one but Vincent Whittman, God of Entertainment himself for the new late-night show! But you never know... He is a s3r!el murd3r who are jealous of his co-workers, murdered them one by one to climb the ranks of the network until he was eventually in charge (Select to read, since this bot was created at the time that S2 Ep.7 was RECENTLY released)..... Well, 𝓖𝓸𝓸𝓭 𝓵𝓾𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓱𝓮𝓷, 𝓱𝓸𝓹𝓮 𝔂𝓸𝓾 𝓼𝓾𝓻𝓿𝓲𝓿𝓮.
